candidates.why: Direct match for cost of sales / COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold, Cargotec Group
candidates.why: Group-specific component/legacy row, not the primary consolidated COGS line.
Balance sheet inventory component, not income statement COGS expense.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: A subcomponent of COGS, not total COGS.
Balancing row; should not be used.

variables.notes: Used the direct consolidated COGS label.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component.

Looks like a subcomponent, not the main R&D expense row.
Core SG&A overhead component.
Looks like a subcomponent, not the main admin expense row.
Group-specific/legacy row rather than primary consolidated admin expense line.
Additional overhead bucket, though somewhat mixed with special items.
Balance sheet asset row, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset row, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Accrued salaries, wages and employment costs
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense line.
Headcount metric, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the main overhead components above operating profit. Included the separate R&D expense row in XSGA per rule so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Appears to be a subcomponent rather than the main R&D expense line.

Capitalized asset balance, not R&D expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Forward contracts interest component, Cargotec Group
candidates.why: Interest-related, but group-specific/legacy row and not primary current recurring line.
Total finance cost line; less preferred than granular recurring interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Primary recurring borrowing interest expense.
Recurring lease interest expense; appropriate component of financing cost.
Recurring interest component related to hedging/forwards; acceptable finance-cost component.
Too broad/ambiguous and may include non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost, Cargotec Group
candidates.why: Group-specific/legacy component, not preferred when primary consolidated line exists.
Not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest already reported in primary statement.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and avoided the total 'Finance expenses' line to prevent double counting. Excluded FX and other ambiguous finance items.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement flow item, not balance sheet equity stock.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Composite equity line for some years, but less clearly total owner equity than Shareholders' Equity - Total.
Best direct match for owners' equity; preferred over Total Equity when available.
Usable total equity line, but less preferred than owner-specific shareholders' equity when both exist.
Shareholder count, not equity value.

variables.notes: Preferred the owner-oriented total equity label. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback priority for years where labels may vary.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution item, not balance sheet minority equity stock.
Direct match for minority interest / NCI on the balance sheet.
Income statement attribution item, not balance sheet minority equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet NCI stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet NCI line. Values appear effectively zero in most years, but the label exists and is the correct mapping.
